name: com.cross-deck/prism
title: Prism — Crossdeck
description: Ask your app anything — revenue, errors, database read-cost, growth — in plain English, and get rendered charts and dashboards back. An intelligence layer that crosses identity, revenue, entitlements, errors and analytics, so one question can answer which paying customer an error hit and what it costs.

environmentVariables.name: CROSSDECK_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Crossdeck secret key (cd_sk_…) from the dashboard → API keys. Server-side only; never a publishable key.

environmentVariables.name: CROSSDECK_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (e.g. for sandbox). Optional.
